About The Small World Tree Company

The Small World Tree Company started with a simple vision: to provide exceptional tree care while fostering a deep appreciation for the urban forest in San Francisco. Founded by a certified arborist with a passion for preserving the health and beauty of trees, we've grown from a small team to a dedicated crew serving the entire Bay Area.

Learn More About Us
Since 2014 Established
Locally Owned
Licensed & Insured
W2 Employees

Our Tree Service Services

Professional tree service solutions tailored to your needs.

Tree Pruning

Enhance the health, beauty, and safety of your trees with professional pruning services.

Tree Removal

Safely and efficiently remove trees that are hazardous, diseased, or unwanted.

Stump Grinding

Remove unsightly tree stumps and reclaim your yard with our professional stump grinding services.

Learn More →

Tree Planting

Enhance your property and the environment with our professional tree planting services.

Learn More →

Emergency Tree Service

24/7 emergency tree services for storm damage, fallen trees, and other urgent situations.

Learn More →

Tree Risk Assessment

Identify potential hazards and protect your property with our comprehensive tree risk assessment services.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our tree service services.

How often should I prune my trees?

The frequency of pruning depends on the species, age, and condition of your trees. Generally, young trees should be pruned every 2-3 years, while mature trees can be pruned every 3-5 years.

What is the best time of year to prune trees in San Francisco?

The best time to prune most trees in San Francisco is during the dormant season, typically late fall or early winter. However, certain species may benefit from pruning at other times of the year.

Can I prune my trees myself?

While you can prune small branches, it's best to hire a professional arborist for larger or more complex pruning tasks. Improper pruning can damage your trees and create safety hazards.

Reviews From Our Tree Service Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"The Small World Tree Company did an amazing job pruning our overgrown oak tree. The crew was professional, efficient, and clearly knowledgeable. They thinned out the canopy beautifully, improving the sunlight in our backyard. I highly recommend them!"

Maria S. Tree Pruning

"We had a large eucalyptus tree that was dying and needed to be removed. The Small World Tree Company provided a competitive quote and completed the job safely and efficiently. The team was careful to protect our property and cleaned up thoroughly afterward. My only suggestion is better communication leading up to the removal date."

David K. Tree Removal

"After having a tree removed, we were left with an unsightly stump in our front yard. The Small World Tree Company came out and ground the stump quickly and efficiently. You can't even tell a tree was ever there! Great service and reasonable prices."

Jennifer L. Stump Grinding
